title: Madhya Pradesh HC dismisses Congress MLA Abhay Kumar Mishra's plea to reject election petition against him
description: The Madhya Pradesh High Court recently dismissed an application filed by Congress MLA Abhay Kumar Mishra for the rejection of a petition challenging his 2023 election to the State assembly from the Semariya Vidhan Sabha Constituency [Krishna Pati Tripathi v Abhay Kumar Mishra].Justice Vinay Saraf found there are specific allegations against Mishra of suppression of material information concerning criminal antecedents and outstanding liabilities.The Court concluded that there was a prima fac
